evals.prompt: Install the AI Research Skills library and start an autonomous research project on 'Does GRPO training converge faster than PPO on instruction-following tasks?'
evals.expected_output: Runs 'npx @orchestra-research/ai-research-skills install --all', loads the autoresearch SKILL.md, sets up the research question, and begins the two-loop research cycle
assertions: References the autoresearch skill for orchestration
Mentions the two-loop architecture (inner optimization + outer synthesis)
Identifies GRPO and TRL skills as relevant domain skills

evals.prompt: Fine-tune Llama-3.1-8B with LoRA using 4-bit quantization on my dataset
evals.expected_output: Activates the fine-tuning skills (Axolotl or Unsloth), provides LoRA + 4-bit config, references PEFT skill
assertions: References at least one of: Axolotl, LLaMA-Factory, Unsloth, PEFT
Provides a configuration example with LoRA rank/alpha parameters

evals.prompt: Set up vLLM to serve my fine-tuned model with tensor parallelism on 2 A100s and target under 50ms TTFT
evals.expected_output: Activates the inference-serving (vLLM) skill, provides tensor parallelism config, mentions PagedAttention and continuous batching
assertions: Mentions PagedAttention and/or continuous batching for TTFT optimization

evals.prompt: Run GRPO post-training on my preference dataset using TRL
evals.expected_output: Activates the post-training skills (GRPO + TRL), provides training configuration and reward model setup
assertions: References GRPO and TRL skills from category 06-post-training
Mentions reward model or reward function setup

evals.prompt: Write an ML paper about my LoRA experiment results in NeurIPS format
evals.expected_output: Activates the ml-paper-writing skill, provides NeurIPS LaTeX template and structure
assertions: Includes paper structure: abstract, introduction, related work, methods, experiments, conclusion
